subcodes.first_line: O Herald of Truth! Praise be to God that the family of his honour Samandar have, at all times, been heralds to the Kingdom of the Lord of Signs [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منادی حق الحمد لله خاندان حضرت سمندر اکثر در جمیع اوقات منادی بملکوت رب الایات
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @high station of the true believer, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
